title: Nursery Rhyme. DLX. Natural History.
content:
Snail, snail, put out your horns,
        I'll give you bread and barleycorns.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DLX. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
